zeitplan.title: Schedule & Startlists
zeitplan.description: Plan your stadium visit or track start times and team divisions of the athletes in the Bungertstadion.
zeitplan.liveInfo: The schedule and startlists are provided live via laportal.net. Use the search within the schedule to filter for specific disciplines, heats, or athlete names.
zeitplan.prepInfo1: The schedule will be published directly here approx. 4 weeks before the Pfingstsportfest.
zeitplan.prepInfo2: One week before the event, the startlists will be made available via the live results portal.
zeitplan.ticketsInfo: Seating tickets for the covered main grandstand are limited and in high demand! Inform yourself early.

footer.description: The Pfingstsportfest Rehlingen is a renowned track and field meeting of the World Athletics Continental Tour (Silver Status), organized by the Leichtathletik-Club Rehlingen e.V. in the saarländische Bungert Stadium.
